userRequest: Add user profile editing with avatar upload

decomposition.reasoning: This feature has backend (API + storage) and frontend (form + cropper) components with a natural dependency chain. Review should cover security (upload validation) and UX.

tasks.description: Backend: API endpoint for profile update with avatar upload to cloud storage
Frontend: Profile edit form with avatar cropper and preview
Review for security (upload validation, file type/size limits, auth) and UX (error states, loading, responsiveness)
